arts.ttl: Aston Villa’s €35M-Rated Standout Hints at Long-Term Stay Despite Barcelona, PSG Links
arts.sum: This past summer, Paris Saint-Germain explored various options to strengthen their attack for the 2024-25 season, with Aston Villa’s Jhon Durán among those on their radar. In October, Eduardo Burgos of Diario AS reported that Bayern Munich and PSG submitted offers for Durán during the summer transfer window, but Aston Villa turned them down. arts.ttl: Bayern Munich Have Plan to Beat PSG, Secure Brighton’s €22M-Rated Star
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain are currently facing uncertainty regarding their goalkeeping situation, particularly with Gianluigi Donnarumma’s future up in the air. Should the club decide to part ways with the 25-year-old, they will need to search for a replacement in the transfer market. arts.ttl: Why Arsenal, Liverpool’s £66M-Rated Target Suits Premier League Amid PSG Exit Rumors
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain took a short-term approach by loaning Xavi Simons to RB Leipzig for another season. However, a more permanent decision about his future, potentially a transfer, is expected next summer. In September, journalist Christian Falk reported that Manchester City and Liverpool are keeping a close eye on Simons’ situation. arts.ttl: Manchester United Tipped to Sell £40M-Rated Star Amid PSG Transfer Rumors
arts.sum: With Ruben Amorim now leading Manchester United, Marcus Rashford’s future at the club could be entering a period of uncertainty. Despite this, transfer rumors surrounding the English forward show no signs of slowing down. In October, TEAMtalk reported that Paris Saint-Germain have reignited their interest in Rashford.
